mapper.sql: id, test_id, part_group_id, passage_no, title, content, material_type, display_order, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_passage ( test_id, part_group_id, passage_no, title, content, material_type, display_order, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{testId}, #{partGroupId}, #{passageNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{materialType}, #{displayOrder}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reading_passage WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM reading_passage WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM reading_passage WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY passage_no ASC, display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM reading_passage WHERE test_id = #{testId} ORDER BY passage_no ASC, display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM reading_passage WHERE part_group_id = #{partGroupId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY passage_no ASC, display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM reading_passage WHERE part_group_id = #{partGroupId} ORDER BY passage_no ASC, display_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_passage SET part_group_id = #{partGroupId}, passage_no = #{passageNo}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, material_type = #{materialType}, display_order = #{displayOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_passage SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE reading_passage SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE reading_passage SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE part_group_id = #{partGroupId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE reading_passage SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
UPDATE reading_passage SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 1
UPDATE reading_passage SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE part_group_id = #{partGroupId} AND is_deleted = 1
